content.json:
# Case Search Metrics
Monitor case search usage: search volume, search types, user behavior, and performance patterns.

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "First Search Action"
| summarize TotalSearches = count(),
            UniqueUsers = dcount(user_Id),
            AvgTimeToSearch = avg(todouble(customMeasurements.timeToFirstSearch)) / 1000
| project TotalSearches, UniqueUsers, AvgTimeToSearchSeconds = round(AvgTimeToSearch, 1)
content.title: Search Summary

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "First Search Action"
| summarize SearchCount = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Searches Per Hour

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "First Search Action"
| extend searchType = tostring(customDimensions.searchType)
| summarize Count = count() by searchType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Search Types

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "First Search Action"
| extend searchType = tostring(customDimensions.searchType)
| summarize Count = count() by searchType, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Search Types Over Time

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "First Search Action"
| extend timeToSearchMs = todouble(customMeasurements.timeToFirstSearch)
| extend timeToSearchSeconds = timeToSearchMs / 1000
| summarize 
    AvgTime = avg(timeToSearchSeconds),
    MedianTime = percentile(timeToSearchSeconds, 50),
    P90Time = percentile(timeToSearchSeconds, 90),
    P95Time = percentile(timeToSearchSeconds, 95)
| project 
    ['Average (s)'] = round(AvgTime, 1),
    ['Median (s)'] = round(MedianTime, 1),
    ['90th Percentile (s)'] = round(P90Time, 1),
    ['95th Percentile (s)'] = round(P95Time, 1)
content.title: Time to First Search Distribution

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "First Search Action"
| extend timeToSearchMs = todouble(customMeasurements.timeToFirstSearch)
| extend timeToSearchSeconds = timeToSearchMs / 1000
| extend TimeBucket = case(
    timeToSearchSeconds < 5, "0-5s",
    timeToSearchSeconds < 10, "5-10s",
    timeToSearchSeconds < 30, "10-30s",
    timeToSearchSeconds < 60, "30-60s",
    timeToSearchSeconds < 300, "1-5m",
    "5m+"
)
| summarize Count = count() by TimeBucket
| order by TimeBucket asc
content.title: Time to First Search Histogram

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Landing Page Navigation"
| extend fromPage = tostring(customDimensions.fromPage)
| extend toPage = tostring(customDimensions.toPage)
| where fromPage == "case-search"
| summarize Count = count() by toPage
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Top Destinations from Case Search

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Landing Page Navigation"
| extend timeOnPage = todouble(customMeasurements.timeOnLandingPage) / 1000
| extend fromPage = tostring(customDimensions.fromPage)
| where fromPage == "case-search"
| summarize 
    AvgTime = avg(timeOnPage),
    MedianTime = percentile(timeOnPage, 50)
| project 
    ['Average Time on Search Page (s)'] = round(AvgTime, 1),
    ['Median Time on Search Page (s)'] = round(MedianTime, 1)
content.title: Time Spent on Search Page
